name: Ricotta-Basil Tart
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup fresh basil leaves, roughly chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the butter and sugar. Beat until smooth.
2. Add the cornmeal, eggs, and salt to the mixture. Mix well.
3. Gradually add the flour and beat until soft and moist but still manageable to roll out to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
4. Cut into desired size and press into a tart or pie pan.
5. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C). Bake for 5 minutes.
6. Remove from oven, cool completely.
7. In a saucepan or skillet over medium heat, melt the butter. Add the shallots and sauté for 4-5 minutes until softened.
8. Add the white wine and reduce by half. Stir occasionally to prevent burning.
9. Reduce the heat to low and add the cream. Reduce by half again.
10. Remove from heat and let cool.
11. In a large bowl, combine the cream cheese and ricotta cheese. Mix well.
12. Add the chopped basil leaves and cooled reduction to the mixture. Mix until combined.
13. Beat in the eggs, one at a time, just until incorporated. Season with salt to taste.
14. Pour the filling into the prepared pastry shell.
15. Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C) for conventional ovens or maintain 350°F (175°C) for convection ovens. Bake for 30-35 minutes, or until set in the center.
16. Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving. Garnish with sour cream if desired and serve warm or at room temperature.
